evidence.claim: For 5000 concurrent users on Fargate, allocate ~0.01 vCPU per active user (~50 vCPU total), ~13 tasks at 4 vCPU + 8 GiB each; total compute ~$1,450/month + memory ~$160 + ALB + CloudWatch in low-four-figure range
evidence.quote_or_excerpt: 5000 concurrent users: ~0.01 vCPU per active user ≈ 50 vCPU total, 13 tasks at 4 vCPU + 8 GiB memory; baseline compute ~$1,450/month + memory ~$160
